query:
-- Update Amber to Health Manager (not Operations Support)
UPDATE employees SET 
  department = 'Health',
  jobTitle = 'Health Manager',
  positionLevel = 'manager'
WHERE firstName = 'Amber' OR (firstName = 'Amber' AND lastName LIKE '%');

-- Update Amandes to Media Manager/Creative Director
UPDATE employees SET 
  jobTitle = 'Media Manager/Creative Director',
  positionLevel = 'executive'
WHERE firstName = 'Amandes' OR (department = 'Media' AND jobTitle = 'Creative Director');

-- Update Essence to Design Manager/Design Lead
UPDATE employees SET 
  jobTitle = 'Design Manager/Design Lead',
  positionLevel = 'manager'
WHERE firstName = 'Essence' OR (department = 'Design' AND firstName = 'Essence');

-- Check if Amber exists, if not we need to add her
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, department, jobTitle FROM employees WHERE firstName IN ('Amber', 'Amandes', 'Essence');
